summary: Tested unified tactical breakdown architecture change (iteration 23). All 7 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI elements verified successfully. The Tactical tab has been removed - app now has only 2 tabs (SCAN and TRACKING). POST /api/predict now returns 'tacticalBreakdown' field as part of every prediction response.
passed_tests: GET /api/cache/status returns valid counts (leagues=1225, teams=1158, players=23992)
POST /api/tactical/start returns session_id and welcome message (for follow-up chat)
POST /api/predict returns response with 'tacticalBreakdown' field (non-empty string with tactical analysis)
POST /api/predict tacticalBreakdown includes international stats when match is international (Denmark vs Czech Republic)
POST /api/predict has all required fields including tacticalBreakdown
Frontend: Only 2 tabs visible (SCAN and TRACKING) — Tactical tab correctly removed
Frontend: Scan tab loads with upload zone
critical_code_review_comments: predict.py lines 1096-1190: Unified tactical breakdown generation using SYNTH_SYSTEM from tactical.py
predict.py line 1128: _fetch_player_stats_structured() fetches international stats when applicable
predict.py line 1190: prediction['tacticalBreakdown'] = tactical_breakdown — key field added to response
App.js lines 2194-2206: Bottom nav has only 2 tabs (Scan and Tracking)
App.js lines 1756-1793: scan-tactical-section renders tacticalBreakdown from prediction response
App.js lines 1793-1860: scan-followup-section with chat input for follow-up questions
seed_data_creation: None - using existing MongoDB cache data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Major architecture change verified: Tactical tab removed, now only 2 tabs (SCAN | TRACKING). POST /api/predict now returns 'tacticalBreakdown' field as part of every prediction response. The predict endpoint takes 30-60 seconds because it runs both statistical prediction AND tactical synthesis. International context detection working - queries with national teams (e.g., Denmark vs Czech Republic) include international stats in tacticalBreakdown. Follow-up chat endpoints (/api/tactical/start, /api/tactical/message) still work for questions about predictions.

removed.tactical_tab: No longer exists in bottom navigation
removed.separate_tactical_flow: Tactical analysis is now embedded in predict response

added.tacticalBreakdown_field: predict.py line 1190 - added to every prediction response
added.unified_analysis: predict.py lines 1096-1189 - generates tactical breakdown using SYNTH_SYSTEM

preserved.tactical_start_endpoint: Still works for follow-up chat sessions
preserved.tactical_message_endpoint: Still works for follow-up questions about predictions

predict_response_structure.tacticalBreakdown_content: Deep tactical analysis text including: Verdict, Role & Matchup, Key Numbers, Game Flow Scenarios, Risk Factors, TL;DR
predict_response_structure.international_awareness: When match is international (e.g., Denmark vs Czech Republic), tacticalBreakdown includes national team stats and international form
